title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Knowledge Graphs
description: Researching hybrid retrieval methods that combine semantic search with graph-based reasoning for more explainable and context-aware AI systems.

title: Digital Government and ICT Policy
description: Investigating policy frameworks and technical implementations that drive efficient, transparent, and inclusive digital public services.

title: Labor-Market and Skills Intelligence Systems
description: Developing data-driven models for mapping and analyzing the evolving landscape of workforce skills and occupational requirements.

title: Cloud Infrastructure and Public-Sector Systems
description: Researching scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud-native architectures tailored for government and institutional operations.

title: Human-Computer Interaction / XR and Learning Analytics
description: Exploring immersive technologies and data analytics to enhance educational experiences and understand learner behavior.
